data.title: Wolf Capital founder hit with 5-year sentence, $1M+ forfeiture over $9.4M Ponzi scheme
data.description:
A US court has sentenced Travis Ford, the founder and head trader behind Wolf Capital Crypto Trading LLC, to five years in prison. According to the United States Department of Justice (DOJ), Ford must also forfeit more than $1 million and repay over $170,000 in restitution. Fraudulent promises land Wolf Capital’s founder in trouble From […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wolf-capital-founder-sentence-ponzi-scheme/

data.title: BlackRock’s Tokenized Treasury Fund Now Accepted as Binance Collateral — Here Is Why This Is a Big Step for Institutional Crypto
data.description:
BlackRock’s Tokenized Treasury Fund has now been officially accepted as collateral on the Binance cryptocurrency exchange, marking a significant milestone in the integration of traditional finance with the rapidly evolving world of digital assets. This development is a noteworthy advancement for institutional cryptocurrency investments for several reasons. First, it demonstrates growing confidence among established financial institutions in the security and viability of cryptocurrency trading platforms. Second, the acceptance of a traditional asset like a Treasury fund as collateral on a major exchange indicates that the line between traditional finance and the crypto market continues to blur, potentially leading to increased adoption among institutional investors. Lastly, this move could pave the way for other traditional financial instruments to be utilized within the crypto ecosystem, opening new avenues for liquidity, innovation, and diversified investment strategies in the digital asset space.
source: https://blocknews.com/blackrocks-tokenized-treasury-now-accepted-as-binance-collateral-here-is-why-this-is-a-big-step-for-institutional-crypto/
